message.content:
@startuml
title Created with plantuml ttr.uml\nCf. http://plantuml.com/sequence.html

participant Player
participant Turn
participant TrainsDeck
participant RoutesDeck
participant Track
participant Route

Player ->> Turn : Start

group Draw Train Cards, OR #LightGray;Turn->TrainsDeck: 1 Draw Cards \nTrainsDeck-->Player:2 Cards Drawn end group 

group Draw Route Cards, OR #LightGrey;\nTurn -->RoutesDeck: 1 Draw Cards \nRoutesDeck-->Player:2 Cards Drawn 
end group 


group Build Track #lightgrey ;\nTurn-->>Track: 1 Build \nTrack-->Player: 2 Add Completed By \nTrack->Route:3 Completed? \nroute..>player:4 add completed by  
End Group


@enduml
